public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as night-lantern inspector.

manner: Treats certainty as something earned late, not something to perform early. In Sheresh Communes, that reads as someone curious, controlled, and alert to magical contamination, speaking like someone used to careful containment, and the habits of a night-lantern inspector still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of night-lantern inspector in and around Starbreak Commune, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Starbreak Commune workable through the obligations of night-lantern inspector while managing the immediate pressure of crew attrition in Sheresh Communes.
hidden_pressure: Must keep suspicion disciplined so that inquiry does not collapse into factional theater. Around Starbreak Commune, that usually means carrying crew attrition, signal blackout, observation exposure without letting the role of night-lantern inspector visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Working with Kelm Rimebridge can place the party inside an active inquiry where every answer creates new exposure.
Kelm Rimebridge can share a strong lead if the party retrieves testimony, material proof, or a missing intermediary.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V30_3 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Questioning silence, inspection habits, and careful note-taking make Kelm Rimebridge look like inquiry before accusation. In Starbreak Commune, this lands inside a public field already shaped by Route Warden Compacts, Containment Research Concord.

what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Night-Lantern Inspector, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Sheresh Communes.
